testcase.name: Create Service Request (v2) › TC-01: Login as Admin

Test timeout of 90000ms exceeded.

testcase.name: Create Service Request (v2) › TC-02: Navigate to Service Requests
testcase.error:
projects/dep/test-plans/service-requests/create-service-request-v2.spec.ts:43:7 › Create Service Request (v2) › TC-02: Navigate to Service Requests
Test timeout of 90000ms exceeded.
Error: locator.fill: Test timeout of 90000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Username' })
10 | async function loginAsAdmin(page: Page) { 11 | await page.goto(APP_URL); > 12 | await page.getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Username' }).fill(ADMIN.user); | ^ 13 | await page.getByRole('textbox', { name: 'Password' }).fill(ADMIN.password); 14 | await page.getByRole('button', { name: 'Sign In' }).click(); 15 | await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle'); at loginAsAdmin (/home/runner/work/Test-ReportsHub/Test-ReportsHub/projects/dep/test-plans/service-requests/create-service-request-v2.spec.ts:12:57) at /home/runner/work/Test-ReportsHub/Test-ReportsHub/projects/dep/test-plans/service-requests/create-service-request-v2.spec.ts:44:5
